title: Populate docs/fe-track/12-behavioral/ content
description:
Directory only has README.md and mindmap-behavioral.md. Roadmap references many missing files (e.g. 01-star-method.md and others under 12-behavioral/).

Suggested files (verify against roadmap rows):
- 01-star-method.md (STAR storytelling framework)
- Cross-reference all roadmap rows pointing to 12-behavioral/*

Could be tackled together with the broken-paths issue or independently.

title: Fix 22 broken paths in fe-track/00-study-roadmap.md
description:
Roadmap references files that don't exist on disk. Either create stub files or remove the rows.

Known broken paths (incomplete list):
- 09-advanced-topics/01-data-structures-js.md
- 09-advanced-topics/* (multiple)
- 12-behavioral/01-star-method.md
- 12-behavioral/* (multiple — dir only has README.md and mindmap-behavioral.md)
- shared/* (several paths)

Audit command: grep -oE '\[.+\]\([^)]+\.md\)' docs/fe-track/00-study-roadmap.md, then test each path with ls.

Decision needed: stub vs remove (per row or per section).

title: Add .DS_Store to .gitignore
description: macOS .DS_Store files are currently tracked and show as dirty in git status. Add to .gitignore and run 'git rm --cached' on existing tracked ones.
